creator: zaphod@berentweb.com
text:
My comment did not go through, re-posting:
Disabling I18N option breaks the build at packaging stage such as:

pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11/lumina/work/stage/usr/local/share/lumina-desktop/i18n/lumina-config_en_GB.qm:No such file or directory
